Download for free

Coach Bowman NIL Program

This program gives athletes the opportunity to earn money while promoting a high-quality video review tool.

Schedule Onboarding Call Learn more

Make Money Promoting Coach Bowman

Guaranteed Payment

Receive $125 for creating four unique in-feed social media posts over two months. That’s $31.25 per post, scheduled every two weeks.

Commission Earnings

Earn 20% commission on every new subscription purchased using your personal discount code. Annual subscriptions cost $99.99 USD.

Invite-a-Teammate Bonus

Earn $10 for every person you invite who completes the NIL Program. They’ll also receive $10 upon completion. There’s no cap, so you can invite as many teammates and friends as you’d like!

Proven Content & Results

Content Vault

We stockpile proven content ideas that athletes have already used to make money. You’ll get brand creatives, guidelines, and a clear playbook

The Playbook

We help you define the format, focuses, and features to discuss. Trial three hooks, find the winner, and share the best performer as your main post. We update our vault with every trial and new post.

Built for Busy Athletes

Flexible Scheduling

We know being a student-athlete takes real effort and sacrifice. That’s why the NIL Program is designed to work around your schedule; just four posts in two months.

Prerequisites

Must have an iPhone and iPad available to you. Must have at least 1000 followers on Instagram.

Next Steps

Schedule an Onboarding Call to learn more and get access to the NIL Program!
